principles.name: Approved Services
principles.description: Skills document which AI services they work with; never hardcode to a single vendor

principles.name: Data Encryption
principles.description: Skills that handle data document encryption expectations

principles.name: PII Protection
principles.description: Skills that may touch PII document de-identification controls

principles.name: Cost Efficiency
principles.description: Model recommendations use minimum necessary power

principles.name: Bias Awareness
principles.description: Skills that analyze text document bias considerations

principles.name: Audit Logging
principles.description: Skills document what should be logged and what should not

created.description: Skills built from scratch by the library maintainer

curated.description: Skills discovered from external resources and adapted

forked.description: Skills forked from open source and customized

categories.name: Meta-Skills
categories.description: Skills that operate on other skills — improvement, universalization, and library governance

categories.name: Data & Analytics
categories.description: Skills for data pipelines, analysis, NLP, survey processing, and business intelligence

categories.name: Document Generation
categories.description: Skills for creating, populating, and managing presentations, reports, and batch documents

categories.name: Design & Frontend
categories.description: Skills for design validation, accessibility auditing, layout analysis, and design-to-code workflows

categories.name: Workflow & Automation
categories.description: Skills for orchestrating multi-step workflows, email automation, task management, and session management

skills.name: A11Y WCAG Auditor
skills.description: WCAG 2.2 Level AA design auditor — color contrast, text readability, motion/animation safety, color-blindness testing, font sizing, spacing for dyslexia, keyboard navigation, screen reader optimization, and accessibility compliance scoring.
skills.author: jac007x

skills.name: Data Visualization Expert
skills.description: Expert data visualization — chart selection via decision tree and matrix, Tufte principles, pre-attentive attributes, Gestalt design, semantic color mapping, Chart.js and matplotlib patterns, executive reporting charts, accessibility, and anti-patterns.
skills.author: jac007x

skills.name: Design System Validator
skills.description: Design system compliance auditor — brand palette validation, component standards, spacing rules, shadow depth, border radius, responsive breakpoints, and design debt detection.
skills.author: jac007x

skills.name: Design-to-Code Bridge
skills.description: Design specification exporter — extract measurements, colors, typography specs, spacing values from designs and generate CSS/HTML/JSON specs. Converts PPTX/Figma exports to code-ready design tokens, component APIs, and visual regression baselines.
skills.author: jac007x

skills.name: Designer Orchestrator
skills.description: Master design workflow orchestrator — coordinates design skills through a 4-phase pipeline: design validation, composition audit, accessibility compliance, and code bridge. Produces QA reports, design debt tracking, and documentation handoff.
skills.author: jac007x

skills.name: Email Automation Pattern
skills.description: Bulletproof bulk email automation with browser preview dashboards, draft verification, batch sending, and stakeholder sharing. Reusable pattern for any email workflow.
skills.author: jac007x

skills.name: Meeting Prep Assistant
skills.description: Entropy-aware meeting preparation — pulls context, assesses relationships, surfaces open items, infers real meeting purpose, and produces adaptive briefs matched to meeting uncertainty level
skills.author: jac007x

skills.name: Layout & Composition Analyzer
skills.description: Visual composition expertise — golden ratio, rule of thirds, balance, visual flow, whitespace, alignment grids, Gestalt principles, S-curve patterns, Z-pattern reading paths, focal points, and layout scoring.
skills.author: jac007x

skills.name: MBR Deck Builder
skills.description: End-to-end Monthly Business Review deck production orchestrator — data extraction, analysis, visualization, slide design, visual QA, and iterative refinement. Coordinates expert skills and agents into a unified 6-phase pipeline.
skills.author: jac007x

skills.name: Org Data Pipeline
skills.description: Universalized pipeline for pulling, reconciling, slicing, and reporting organizational data. Handles ad-hoc and recurring requests: ingest from any source, validate against a roster, cut by org dimensions, generate formatted reports, and distribute.
skills.author: jac007x

skills.name: PowerBI Reports
skills.description: Pull reports, query data, apply filters, and schedule report bundles from PowerBI dashboards using natural language. Supports DAX queries, CSV/HTML exports, scheduled delivery, and interactive exploration of PowerBI workspaces.
skills.author: jac007x

skills.name: PPTX Expert
skills.description: Expert python-pptx mastery combined with executive slide design principles — charts, tables, shapes, layouts, McKinsey rules, typography hierarchy, brand compliance, conditional formatting, and presentation engine integration.
skills.author: jac007x

skills.name: Adaptive Workflow Architect
skills.description: Designs AI agent workflows using Adaptive Narrative Control Theory (ANCT) — entropy-aware architecture that maps phases to cognitive control modes (delegate, narrate, generate) and builds pipelines that know when to expand and when to compress
skills.author: jac007x

skills.name: Skill Improver
skills.description: Continuous improvement meta-skill for the skill library. Passively observes session flow, friction signals, language patterns, and termination behavior during any skill run — without asking users for feedback. Retrospectively analyzes signal logs to surface improvement proposals, cross-skill patterns, and library health.
skills.author: jac007x

skills.name: Skill Suggestor
skills.description: Detects repeating workflow patterns and proposes new skills — passive observation during any session plus on-demand invocation with structured interview
skills.author: jac007x

skills.name: Skill Universalizer
skills.description: Meta-skill for extracting, universalizing, and codifying reusable workflows from completed agent sessions. Analyzes a team-specific workflow, strips specifics, identifies parameterizable gaps, builds an intake step, and outputs a cross-platform SKILL.md that works in any LLM agent.
skills.author: jac007x

skills.name: Slide Analyzer
skills.description: Unified slide analysis — 7-dimension weighted scoring rubric for visual analysis, programmatic PPTX structural checks (20+ rules), Pillow preview rendering, WCAG accessibility auditing, and iterative improvement workflows.
skills.author: jac007x

skills.name: Survey NLP Analyzer
skills.description: Universalized NLP pipeline for analyzing any large body of open-ended human text. Handles anonymous feedback, open-door cases, idea submissions, survey verbatims, customer forms, support tickets, and more. Runs topic modeling (NMF), sentiment analysis, fallback clustering, quote extraction, and dimensional breakdowns.
skills.author: jac007x

skills.name: Talent Card Generator
skills.description: Universalized pipeline for batch-generating personalized documents from data and templates. Ingests a data source (Excel/CSV/API), maps fields to template placeholders, populates one document per record, validates for completeness, and outputs formatted documents (PPTX, DOCX, PDF, HTML).
skills.author: jac007x

skills.name: Task Rabbit
skills.description: Design audit task manager — owns documentation, identifies CI opportunities, tracks design debt, documents skill gaps, escalates to engineering, and manages remediation workflows. Acts as the executive assistant for design quality assurance.
skills.author: jac007x

skills.name: Session Memory Bootstrap
skills.description: Bootstrap a two-tier MEMORY.md system (global + per-project) for instant session ramp-up. Static/dynamic/rolling-log architecture stays lean across thousands of sessions.
skills.author: jac007x

skills.name: Inbox Intelligence
skills.description: Entropy-aware communications intelligence — rapid inbox triage, persistent knowledge compendium with cross-referenced topics, action-required lists, and self-improving classification. Takes 300 unread to zero-anxiety in under an hour. Compendium feeds downstream skills like meeting-prep-assistant.
skills.author: jac007x

skills.name: Request Scope Builder
skills.description: Transforms vague analytical or informational requests into clearly scoped, answerable briefs with defined success criteria, data requirements, and explicit assumptions.
skills.author: jac007x

skills.name: Executive Rewrite
skills.description: Rewrites any draft communication to executive standards: bottom-line-up-front structure, precise language, calibrated tone, and audience-appropriate variants for email, verbal, and one-pager channels.
skills.author: jac007x

skills.name: Decision Memo Distiller
skills.description: Distills raw meeting notes, threads, or conversations into structured decision memos with owners, deadlines, deferred items, and open questions.
skills.author: jac007x

skills.name: Insight Narrative Builder
skills.description: Transforms raw analytical findings into compelling insight narratives with clear implications, logical flow, and executive-ready summaries.
skills.author: jac007x

skills.name: Status Update Normalizer
skills.description: Normalizes inconsistent status inputs from multiple contributors into structured, consistent status updates with executive and team-level variants.
skills.author: jac007x

skills.name: Objection Prep Simulator
skills.description: Simulates likely objections to any proposal or recommendation, generates stress-tested Q&A pairs, and produces a complete objection-handling prep pack.
skills.author: jac007x

skills.name: Metric Spec Builder
skills.description: Formalizes loosely defined metric concepts into precise, implementation-ready metric specifications with formulas, sources, owners, thresholds, and conflict detection.
skills.author: jac007x

skills.name: Change Comms Architect
skills.description: Architects comprehensive change communication plans with audience-segmented message variants, channel strategy, timing, consistency validation, and Q&A sets for any organizational change.
skills.author: jac007x

skills.name: Output Router
skills.description: Transforms content between formats optimized for the target channel and audience — from analysis to summary, narrative to bullets, full report to deck, or qualitative findings to table.
skills.author: jac007x

skills.name: Privacy Guardrail
skills.description: Scans analytical outputs and communications for privacy risks: small cell sizes, re-identification vectors, sensitive language patterns, and inappropriate people data disclosure. Produces go/no-go recommendation.
skills.author: jac007x

skills.name: Document Adaptor
skills.description: Adapts content from one or more source documents into the format, structure, and style of a target document. Automatically maps content to target slots, surfaces ambiguous mappings for user guidance, previews the adapted draft before final production.
skills.author: jac007x

skills.name: Repo Steward
skills.description: A meticulous repository consistency agent that scans a codebase to extract conventions, detect structural drift and pattern conflicts, canonicalize a single standard per concept, and retroactively apply it across all affected artifacts — code, docs, tests, templates, audits, and cross-references.
skills.author: jac007x

skills.name: Workday Roster Validator
skills.description: Validates whether Workday Worker Change History has propagated correctly into a downstream roster (PowerBI ARS, Workday snapshot, or equivalent). Joins on WIN, compares field-level Proposed values against roster values, and produces a three-sheet Excel reconciliation report with a prioritized action list.
skills.author: jac007x
